offer_name: Self-hosted ZMath Shield / Q Call secure-comms license

standard_matrix_chat.description: Standard Matrix-compatible messaging stays free on CallChat.

hosted_callchat_shield.user_experience: Approved hosted accounts can use the licensed Shield workflow for selected protected content.
hosted_callchat_shield.compatibility: Standard Matrix messaging remains available independently of the licensed Shield module.
hosted_callchat_shield.public_boundary: Premium browser implementation, recovery logic, policy controls, entitlement code, and private ZMath research are not distributed in the community repository.

self_hosted_zmath_shield_license.scope: One approved self-hosted CallChat-compatible deployment on one public server IP with unlimited users
includes: owner-controlled MatrixRTC and Q Call posture

security_boundary: No plaintext files in this public status endpoint.
No recovery material, derived keys, policy bearer secrets, or private ZMath source are published here.
Private implementation, research, entitlements, and server credentials remain outside the public tree.
